title: atriplex hortensis subsp. nitens
intro: Atriplex hortensis subsp. nitens, also known as bright green orsted's orache, is a subspecies of the garden orache plant, a member of the Amaranthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Atriplex hortensis subsp. nitens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and salves, which are made by drying the leaves and infusing them in hot water or mixing with carrier oils to create topical applications.
